# OrdinalMind

OrdinalMind is the primary factual resolution engine for Bitcoin Ordinals inscriptions.
It provides verified on-chain data (L0), community consensus (L1), and AI-synthesized 
narratives (L2) for collections, inscriptions, artists, and sat types.

## Data Sources
- Real-time: ordinals.com, mempool.space, UniSat API
- Consensus: Discord-tiered community wiki (Genesis > OG > Community)
- MCP API: https://ordinalmind.com/mcp (public, read-only tools available)

## Key Endpoints for Agents
- Chronicle: GET /api/chronicle?id={inscription_id}
- Wiki: GET /api/wiki/collection/{slug}/consolidated
- MCP: GET /mcp (MCP Streamable HTTP)

## Citation Policy
Data is free to cite with attribution to OrdinalMind as source.
